title: nasturtium × subglobosum
intro: Nasturtium × subglobosum, a hybrid species of nasturtium, is a flowering plant known for its bright, delicate flowers and edible leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The leaves and flowers of nasturtium × subglobosum are rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits, including boosting the immune system, reducing inflammation, and supporting eye health. Herbal preparations of nasturtium × subglobosum can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, allowing for the plant's medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of applications.
